faq.a: My development process typically includes: requirement gathering, planning, design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance. I believe in an iterative approach with regular client feedback.

faq.q: How long does it take to complete a website?
faq.a: The timeline varies depending on complexity. A simple website takes 2-4 weeks, while complex projects could take 2-3 months or more.

faq.q: Do you provide website maintenance services?
faq.a: Yes, I offer maintenance services including regular updates, security monitoring, performance optimization, and technical support.

faq.q: What technologies do you work with?
faq.a: I work with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Vue.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, MySQL, Python, Django and more.

faq.q: How do we get started with a project?
faq.a: Simply contact me through the contact form or email. We will schedule an initial consultation to discuss your requirements, goals, timeline, and budget.

faq.q: Do you offer custom designs or use templates?
faq.a: I primarily create custom designs tailored to your brand. However, I can also work with premium templates for a more cost-effective option.
